# agentic_research_team Guidelines

Read these before making changes:

- [PRODUCT.md](../PRODUCT.md) - vision, capabilities (v1 vs roadmap), scope, and success criteria.
- [ARCHITECTURE.md](../ARCHITECTURE.md) - target architecture and the framework-reconciliation decision (LangGraph outside, OpenAI Agents SDK pipeline inside as a tool).
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) - setup, conventions, the ADR requirement, and the PR checklist.
- [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) - canonical agent-team spec: roster, control loop, and tool registry.
- [CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md) - operating manual: repo layout, pipeline, data tier, commands, env var names, gotchas. Distinguishes current reality from items marked (target) - keep that discipline.
- [docs/gaps.md](../docs/gaps.md) - gap register: what is done, partial, or missing per capability.

If reality conflicts with any of these documents, update the document in the same
change - reality wins over stale documentation.
